implemented: Yahoo S5 third dataset family preregistration (A1Benchmark + A2Benchmark)
Independent host trial framework with cross-host parity measurement
Rank drift computation between host session distributions
finding: The independent host trial framework enables cross-host routing parity measurement. Yahoo S5 preregistration establishes the third dataset family needed for Phase 2 completion.
decision: Promote independent host trial framework and third family preregistration. Next: evaluate Yahoo S5 and run first independent host trial.
non_claim_lock: Third family is preregistered but not yet evaluated. Independent host trial framework exists but has not been run against real independent host data. No new T1 claims.
